;LOAD changeGreenColor.qmd
;You can't change colors without the changes in changeGreenColor
AFFECT [[6722609618937832156]]
TRAVERSE ?#[[6504254477]]
LOCATE BEFORE [[254480449992140494]]
INSERT {
	component CustomColorSelector: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&432643201877637292&~ {
		~&233724017721034&~: 1
		~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
		~&7081629735527&~.~&8399470807760157065&~: ~&6504329801&~
        ~&425121728314878811&~.~&2918947772029071675&~ {
		~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
		~&7081629735527&~.~&8399470807760157065&~: ~&6504329801&~
		~&5972374&~: colorSelector
		property ~&197088788&~ rgbValue: (0xFF338833)
		~&481641799955318521&~: ~&5971598&~.~&233696851602406&~
		~&7713561545874130&~: {
		    ~&5972376&~ (~&6504254477&~.~&197096108&~.~&214622605608&~ !== ~&6502882289&~.~&7711447212418688&~) {
			~&7083121450889&~ ~&214625660372&~;
		    }
		    ~&7083121450889&~ (rgbValue >>> 0) === (~&6504254477&~.~&197096108&~.~&254525455067777027&~ >>> 0);
		}
		~&254542253295368380&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&604284659367095156&~(rgbValue, ~&6502882289&~.~&7711447212418688&~)
		~&7081372714662&~.~&10578197394989910333&~ {
		    ~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
		    ~&233748328658231&~: !~&6687579895491175043&~.~&10649436345695803527&~(~&6687579895491175043&~.~&8397835311827141323&~.~&214584656136&~)
		    ~&6504074414&~: ~&7081372714662&~.~&10578197394989910333&~.~&6502924770&~
		    ~&8399878573055752961&~: ~&"15114234901221356095&~
		}
		/* Work-around for incorrect spacing applied by FoldoutGridItem:*/
		~&254480451320573660&~.~&495334332051582499&~: ~&477062473974076915&~.~&233744706647566&~ = 8
		            ~&254501108490678590&~ {
			    ~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
                ~&214622605608&~: ~&"503220030291830651&~
                ~&7082507052999&~.~&214622605608&~: ~&5971598&~.~&214622605608&~("#" + (colorSelector.rgbValue >>> 0).~&7713616118928163&~(16))
                ~&7082507052999&~.~&214646099849&~: 20
                ~&15640708674084664669&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&15640708674084664669&~
		property ~&6503679477&~ ~&7713561545874130&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&7713561545874130&~
		~&254503948400290430&~ {
		~&233721384511543&~.~&7712879746914881&~: ~&7083038346995&~
		~&6503823200&~.pointSize: 28
		~&214622605608&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&7713561545874130&~ ? ~&"214646069354&~ : ~&"214621299494&~	
		~&6504315758&~: ("00000000" + ((colorSelector.rgbValue >>> 0).~&7713616118928163&~(16).toUpperCase())).~&214641468857&~(-8)

		inputMask: "HHHHHHHH"
		onEditingFinished: {
			colorSelector.rgbValue = ~&7713428776113935&~(~&6504315758&~,16) >>> 0;

			~&6504254477&~.~&604284659367095156&~(colorSelector.rgbValue, ~&6502882289&~.~&7711447212418688&~);
		}
		~&13733777459642361598&~: {
		    ~&5972376&~ (!~&233748328658231&~ && ~&473450369389093477&~) {
			~&214626153769&~ = ~&214625660372&~
			~&5971598&~.~&486208409901236410&~.~&6503888195&~()
		    }
		}

            }
		}
	    }
    }
}
END TRAVERSE
TRAVERSE ?#[[7069700017500842008]]
LOCATE BEFORE [[254480449992140494]]
INSERT {

~&425121728314878811&~.~&13206231600618488452&~ {
                ~&214632764553&~: "Pick custom color"
                ~&15640708674084664669&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&15640708674084664669&~
                ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
            }
	    CustomColorSelector {
	    }
            ~&425121728314878811&~.~&15740235808997988493&~ {
                ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
            }
	
}
END TRAVERSE
TRAVERSE ?#[[500047409926864674]] 
LOCATE BEFORE [[14125623155555875541]] > [[8051309119171855706]]
INSERT {
            ~&14125623155555875541&~ {
                ~&233744706647566&~: 0
                ~&7081629735527&~.~&8399470807760157065&~: ~&6504329801&~
                ~&425121728314878811&~.~&13206231600618488452&~ {
			~&214632764553&~: "Pick custom color"
                    ~&15640708674084664669&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&15640708674084664669&~
                    ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                }
 CustomColorSelector {
}

            }
	   
       ~&5961939132427509802&~ {}
}
END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
